exports.name: evaluateDecision
indirectRouteCallers: Strategy Room return brief server path
exports.inputContract: KernelInput: id, source, condition, decisionRequired, evidenceChain, internalContradictions, scores, signalStrength, sources, optional existingGraph and expectedOutcome.
exports.outputContract: DecisionKernelOutput: contradictionGraph, decision block, simulation, signal, constraint, verification, crossAssessmentInterference, graphMetrics.
exports.persistenceDestination: None inside kernel; caller owns persistence.
exports.authorityLevel: authoritative evaluator for governed App Router, Strategy Room, executive reporting and instrument paths during compatibility period
overlapWithOtherEngines: runDecisionIntelligence derives contradiction/simulation/authority facts for public diagnostic surfaces
exports.notes: Claims all flows route through it, but runtime evidence disproves that for public Free Signal. Do not wire public adapter until reconciliation contract exists.

exports.name: DecisionIntelligenceKernel
exports.inputContract: KernelInput from lib/intelligence/types: caseId, caseReference, rawScenario, aperture, requestedTier, clarifications, creator/org context.
exports.outputContract: KernelResult: status, translation, classification, livingCase, tiered output, quality failures or clarification questions.
exports.writesState: YES via LivingCasePersistence.save and LivingCaseEventLedger in normal completed path
exports.persistenceDestination: LivingCasePersistence implementation; event ledger in memory/process-local unless adapter persists elsewhere.
exports.authorityLevel: public intake/tiered disclosure compatibility kernel; not selected as final evaluation authority
overlapWithOtherEngines: runDecisionIntelligence also translates, classifies, detects contradictions and synthesizes next move in the same public request
exports.notes: Public route currently invokes this before runDecisionIntelligence, creating ARCH-02 parallel decision-record risk.

exports.name: runConstitutionalOrchestration
exports.inputContract: answers, EngineContext, optional telemetry, optional upstream evidence context.
exports.readsPriorState: YES_OPTIONAL upstream evidence context supplied by caller
exports.persistenceDestination: None inside orchestrator; diagnostic route/store owns persistence.
exports.authorityLevel: constitutional workflow orchestrator and adapter source, not canonical decision-state authority
overlapWithOtherEngines: runDecisionIntelligence can adapt constitutional output and derive route/readiness facts
exports.notes: Routes constitutional signal packets; must not become source of truth.

exports.name: composeCaseDerivedJudgement
indirectRouteCallers: gold output composers for diagnostic/product surfaces
exports.inputContract: DecisionCaseInput: decisionDescription, constraint, stakeholders, deadline, consequenceOfDelay, desiredOutcome and matched signals.
exports.outputContract: CaseDerivedJudgementResult: judged with classification/judgement or insufficient_pattern_evidence.
exports.authorityLevel: derived judgement only; must reference authoritative state version in future contract
overlapWithOtherEngines: Can restate diagnosis, consequence and next move also derived by evaluation engines
exports.notes: May not silently recalculate evaluation facts; Phase 1.5 contract requires reference to authoritative state version.

routeCallChains.kernelOrEvaluator: DecisionIntelligenceKernel.process() and runDecisionIntelligence(); main evaluateDecision is not imported
routeCallChains.persistence: persistPublicSignalFromDecisionIntelligence() writes public-safe DiagnosticJourney events; DecisionIntelligenceKernel also calls LivingCasePersistence.save on completed path
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Route source contains direct call expressions for kernel.process, runDecisionIntelligence, persistPublicSignalFromDecisionIntelligence and composeCaseDerivedJudgement.

routeCallChains.orchestrator: route-local assembly plus reporting DTO builders
routeCallChains.persistence: Prisma diagnostic journey/stage/checkpoint/reporting records via imported stores and prisma.server
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Route source contains direct evaluateDecision call and Prisma imports.

routeCallChains.orchestrator: evaluateStateTransition, computeDynamicConsequence, strategy room access guard
routeCallChains.persistence: Reads Prisma StrategyRoomExecutionSession, decisions, DiagnosticDecisionObject and retained decision status
routeCallChains.response: Decision surface payload / no-store JSON response
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Route source contains direct evaluateDecision call after loading session decisions.

routeCallChains.route: library pipeline, consumed by enterprise/alignment tests and product paths
routeCallChains.response: pipeline return object for consuming route/product layer
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Pipeline source contains direct evaluateDecision call.

routeCallChains.kernelOrEvaluator: runDecisionIntelligence internal engines; main evaluateDecision not imported by this route
routeCallChains.judgementComposer: enterprise-assessment gold composer may compose derived judgement outside the submit route
routeCallChains.persistence: handleDiagnosticSubmit/saveDiagnosticRecord plus diagnostic journey persistence in runDecisionIntelligence when enabled
routeCallChains.response: diagnostic submit response with enterprise result surface summary
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Route source contains afterCreate dynamic import and call to runDecisionIntelligence.

routeCallChains.kernelOrEvaluator: no decision evaluation kernel invoked in the verified route path
routeCallChains.persistence: Prisma DiagnosticRecord/OutcomeVerificationRecord style records through outcome services
routeCallChains.response: Outcome verification result / provenance normalized record
routeCallChains.runtimeProof: Route source contains submitOutcomeVerification or verifyAndPersistOutcome calls and no evaluateDecision call.
